text.message: Don’t rob me I’ve already been robbed

one of us has less production and worse ports
Wow I’m genuinely surprised you gave black that settle
I'm genuinely surprised you blocked us when red is leading
need to get my hand moving
im suprissed u kept robbing me when blue has army and red a settle
